summary: Iteration 42: Verified 2 mobile layout fixes - (1) OnboardingWizard moved higher on dashboard and now visible at y=204px without scrolling on mobile viewport (390x844), (2) Header background changed to fully opaque solid color - dark mode: rgb(15,22,41) = #0F1629, light mode: rgb(219,234,254) = #DBEAFE. Both header and bottom navigation have no transparency. Backdrop-filter: none.

test_credentials.note: Removed carryon_onboarding_dismissed to ensure wizard shows

context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile layout fixes verified. OnboardingWizard now appears right after welcome header (before Estate Selector). Header and bottom nav use CSS variable --mobile-nav-bg which is #0F1629 (dark) and #DBEAFE (light) - both fully opaque RGB values with no alpha channel.

tested_features.mobile_onboarding_wizard_visibility: PASS - Visible at y=204px on 390x844 viewport without scrolling
tested_features.mobile_header_opacity_dark: PASS - Background: rgb(15,22,41) fully opaque, no backdrop-filter
tested_features.mobile_header_opacity_light: PASS - Background: rgb(219,234,254) fully opaque, no backdrop-filter
tested_features.mobile_bottom_nav_opacity: PASS - Background: rgb(15,22,41) fully opaque in dark mode
tested_features.hamburger_menu_opens_sheet: PASS - Side sheet opens correctly when clicking menu button
tested_features.desktop_dashboard_renders: PASS - Dashboard renders correctly on 1920x800 with OnboardingWizard in new position
